title: Card container_security_113 - Delete image support
body:
Add support to mark images for deletion from repository

Requires:
- V2 API and schema
- registry configured to allow deletes
- run registry garbage collection to free up disk space

Signed-off-by: Jhon Honce jhonce@redhat.com

comments.body: Does skopeo have any other interactive routines?  If not, I think we should just delete the image with out prompting the user for confirmation.  Then we could put the confirmation into the atomic command.
@rhatdan I can move that functionality. I tend to error on the safe side of delete.
Agree, I think atomic should handle the interactive confirmation
